information.en: Creates a b0-map image and calculates is mean and std from a gre field map (2 mag images, 1 phase diff image). NOTE: This recipe assumes the first scan is the gre field map, as such it will collect and copy the first 3 images, leaving all other images unaltered.

regulatory_information.special_operating_instructions: Requires a gre_field_map scan to function, returns both mag images and phase image along with B0map image with image comment of std and mean, (both do not include 0).
regulatory_information.additional_relevant_information: This container is currently still being testing

information.en: Define the config to be executed by MRD server
Number of Dilations for the Brain Mask, NOTE: Dilations happen before Erosions
Number of Erosions for the Brain Mask, NOTE: Dilations happen before Erosions
bet2 -f argument; fractional intensity threshold (0->1); default=0.4; smaller values give larger brain outline estimates
Send Original Magnitude 1, 2 and Phase images back along with B0map
Manually define TE1 in case it cannot be found during scan. UNITS: milliseconds
Manually define TE2 in case it cannot be found during scan. UNITS: milliseconds
